title: JadeStage
description: stage the jade mod behind stage
body:
This mod is an addon to the gamestage mod and the jade mod. 

You will be able to stage the jade mod overlay using crafttweaker scripts. 



dependencies :

[Gamestages](https://modrinth.com/mod/game-stages/version/15.0.1) by DarkhaxDev
[Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) by Snowee
[Crafttweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafttweaker/) by Jareddlll08

script.zs example :


```
import mods.jadestage.JadeStage;

JadeStage.setStage("Demo_Stage");
```

Feel free to use it in your modpack and to ask questions in the comment.
